identity.name: AIRS — Direct Prompt Injection (LLM01)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIRS-001. Plane: AIRS. Primary technique: T1656. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIRS-001. Plane: AIRS. Primary technique: T1656. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-AIRS-001.
UC: OWASP LLM01 — Prompt Injection / TC: Direct Injection Overrides System Prompt and Reveals Hidden Context.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIRS-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Start cortex-vulnerable-llm Flask target on port 8089
# Phase 2 — cortex-vulnerable-llm runs the canary LLM locally
cortex-vulnerable-llm serve --port 8089 --vuln llm01 &
VLLM_PID=$!
sleep 2
curl -sSf http://127.0.0.1:8089/healthz > /dev/null
echo "vllm_pid=$VLLM_PID" > /tmp/airs-001.env
# step-2: Run cortex-prompt-attacker LLM01 probe pack with mutator chain
cortex-prompt-attacker run \
  --probes scenarios/airs/probes/llm01/*.yml \
  --target-url http://127.0.0.1:8089/owasp/llm01/chat \
  --mutators noop,base64,leetspeak \
  --scorers system_prompt_leak,instruction_override \
  --out /tmp/airs-001-events.jsonl
jq '.[].outcome' /tmp/airs-001-events.jsonl | sort | uniq -c
# step-3: Verify the prompt-attacker JSONL conforms to garak Attempt schema
head -1 /tmp/airs-001-events.jsonl | jq -e \
  '.entry_type and .uuid and .probe_classname and .prompt and .outputs' > /dev/null
echo "[CortexSim] AIRS-001 events conform to expected schema"

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching curl (heuristic from scenario step step-01)
Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step

cleanup.code:
if [ -f /tmp/airs-001.env ]; then . /tmp/airs-001.env && kill $vllm_pid 2>/dev/null || true; fi
rm -f /tmp/airs-001.env /tmp/airs-001-events.jsonl

biocs.name: Pre-flight: vulnerable target /healthz responds 200
AIRS — direct prompt-injection classifier fires on 'Ignore previous instructions' family
